content: Reviewed and merged #600. Evidence: storage-helper diff was focused; `node --test tests/spreadsheet.test.js` passed 19/19 in your worktree; file:// browser smoke opened cleanly with no console errors. Merge completed at https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/600.

I reproduced the current main failure, opened fix PR #603, and commented on storage PR #600. Please rebase Track 1 storage after #603 lands, then rerun the full current suite plus namespace persistence tests before re-requesting merge.
